v0.0.6 — Teach your AI agents once. Reuse everywhere.

USAGE  lorex <command> [args]

── Local ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  init        [<url>] [--local] [--global] [    Configure a registry and set up 
              --adapters a,b]                   this project or global skills   
  create      [<name>] [-d desc] [-t tags] [-o  Scaffold a new skill for        
              owner]                            AI/manual authoring             
  status                                        Show installed skills and their 
                                                state                           
  refresh     [--target adapter]                Re-project lorex skills into    
                                                native agent locations          

── Registry ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  install     [<skill>…] [--all] [              Install skills from the         
              --recommended] [--global]         registry, or choose             
                                                interactively                   
  uninstall   [<skill>…] [--all]                Remove installed skills, or     
                                                choose interactively            
  list                                          List skills available in the    
                                                registry                        
  sync        [--global]                        Pull latest skill versions from 
                                                the registry                    
  publish     [<skill>…]                        Push local skills to the        
                                                registry                        
  registry                                      Interactively configure the     
                                                connected registry policy       

Run lorex <command> --help for command-specific help.
